markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Juan Bautista Torres wins the Torres vs Aguilar Cardozo professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Piracicaba Round Of 16 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Torres vs Aguilar Cardozo professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Piracicaba Round Of 16 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Juan Bautista Torres win the Torres vs Aguilar Cardozo: Round Of 16 match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Willy Adames records 3+ hits in the A's vs San Francisco professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026 at 3:45 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Willy Adames is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Willy Adames starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Willy Adames is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Willy Adames is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Willy Adames: 3+ hits?

markets.rules_primary: If Casey Schmitt records 1+ hits in the A's vs San Francisco professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026 at 3:45 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Casey Schmitt is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Casey Schmitt starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Casey Schmitt is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Casey Schmitt is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
